entries.title: ON THE PSALMS, Psalm 119 on psalms 119:70
entries.excerpt: "Their heart is curdled as milk" [Psalm 119:70]. Whose, save the proud, whose iniquity he hath said hath been multiplied upon him? But he wisheth it to be understood by this word, and in this passage, that their heart hath become hard. It is used also in a good sense, and is understood to mean, full of grace: for this word, some have also interpreted "curdled." ...
